steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank fills: "Works from this period make up an ______ proportion of the canon." The sentence continues with "but nineteenth-century writers... should be considered just as integral" — the word "but" signals a contrast. The post-revolution works dominate the canon in a way that is excessive relative to what's warranted, so the blank must convey "too large" or "disproportionately large."

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — unspecified: Unspecified means not clearly defined or stated. The passage isn't saying the proportion is unknown — it's arguing the proportion is too high. ✗
  • Choice B — overlooked: Overlooked means ignored or neglected. This is the opposite of the meaning needed — post-revolution works are over-represented, not ignored. ✗
  • Choice C — erratic: Erratic means unpredictable or irregular. The passage makes no claim about inconsistency; the argument is about the size of the proportion, not its variability. ✗
  • Choice D — outsized: Outsized means larger than is appropriate or proportional. Post-revolution works occupy an outsized share of the canon relative to what the author thinks is justified — exactly the contrast "but" signals. ✓
That is the correct answer.
